title: imagebuildah: optimize cache hits for `COPY` and `ADD` instructions
body:
While processing `COPY` and `ADD` try for cache hits in the first
iteration by adding content and populating summary with the digest
generated after adding the content and ignore processing same
instruction again if they were evaluated in the first pass to save
cycles.

See discussion here:
* https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/4118#discussion_r924502857
* https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/4118#discussion_r925877641

Should help in refining code for: https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/4128
